summary: Full backend + frontend regression for the Queue Management System (Lineup). 39/39 pytest cases pass covering auth, RBAC, merchant CRUD, category management, queue join/status/ETA, call-next/serve/skip, TV endpoint, and admin endpoints. Frontend mobile flows verified end-to-end: welcome (login+register tabs+role toggle), customer browse→merchant detail→category→join→live status polling, merchant register→dashboard with call-next/serve, admin panel stats+approve/suspend/reject, and TV landscape display showing NOW SERVING + Up next + Recently served. No red screens, no API 500s.

minor.issue: allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False. Fine for JWT-in-header mobile design, but diverges from auth_playbook recommending explicit origins + credentials when cookies are used. Current design uses AsyncStorage bearer token, so this is acceptable.
No brute-force lockout / rate limiting after N failed attempts (playbook recommends 5). Not blocking, but worth adding.

Contains dead code path (lines 470-471 computing `entry` twice using a potentially-undefined `q` as id fallback). Works correctly due to the safer re-read on line 472, but the first assignment should be removed for clarity.

ui_bugs.issue: Register tab reuses testIDs `login-email-input`, `login-password-input`, `login-submit-button` for email/password/submit fields. Should be renamed to `register-email-input`, `register-password-input`, `register-submit-button` for clarity and to avoid confusion in tests.

issues: expo.err.log shows repeated 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' warnings — non-breaking but should migrate styles from shadowColor/shadowOffset/... to boxShadow for RN Web compatibility.

action_items: (LOW) Rename register-form testIDs in app/index.tsx from login-* to register-* to disambiguate from sign-in form.
(LOW) Clean up the redundant `entry` assignment in POST /api/merchants/{id}/queue/next (server.py line 470-471).
(NICE-TO-HAVE) Add login rate-limit / lockout (auth playbook guideline).
(NICE-TO-HAVE) Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow across glassmorphism components to silence RN Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 627 lines — still manageable but approaching the split-threshold. Consider splitting into routers/{auth,merchants,queue,admin}.py if it grows further.
JWT secret correctly loaded from env; passwords hashed with bcrypt ($2b$...) via gensalt; admin seed is idempotent and refreshes password if env differs. Good.
Mongo _id excluded via projection {'_id': 0} on every read — correct.
Auth optional for POST /api/queue/join is implemented correctly (try/except jwt decode).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows tested (welcome, admin panel, customer join queue, merchant register+dashboard+call-next, TV picker+landscape display)

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed users and merchants via the public API during regression (isolated from production data; safe to leave).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (https://merchant-lineup.preview.emergentagent.com). Admin creds: ardie@anggadipura.com / Admin@123. Existing merchant: m1@test.com / pass1234 (owns 'Cafe Test' merchant id 8f7b9df2-eeec-406b-8696-b4f9bf97e9bb with category 'Coffee'). All testIDs documented in frontend screens; register form currently shares testIDs with sign-in — when testing register flow, use the same login-email-input / login-password-input / login-submit-button selectors after clicking tab-register.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no blocking bugs found. Only cosmetic / naming-convention improvements noted.
